===''Pokémon Horizons: The Series''===
[[File:Katy anime.png|thumb|250px|Katy in {{aniseries|HZ}}]]
====History====
Katy appeared in silhouette alongside the other Gym Leaders in ''[[HZ046|Welcome to Naranja Academy!]]'', and was later mentioned as [[Liko]]'s first challenge at [[Tera Training]].

Katy physically debuted in ''[[HZ047|Put Your Heart Into It!]]'' as the owner of Patisserie Soapberry, where [[Murdock]] was working for the time being. Katy set a baking contest between Liko and [[Coral]] to see which one of them would battle her, which Liko won, allowing Liko to battle her. After Coral threw a tantrum over her loss, Katy gave her a stern scolding and intimidating stare which made Coral leave without further incident. Although Liko lost the battle, Katy gave her a passing mark as she had mastered the basics of Terastallizing.

In ''[[HZ055|Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four]]'', Katy appeared at [[Naranja Academy]] to act as Liko's partner against [[Rika]] in the [[Elite Four Tag Battle]]. In [[HZ056|the following episode]], Katy played the role of support by having her {{p|Lokix}} protect Liko's Floragato from taking damage. When Lokix ended up {{status|poison}}ed, Katy stopped holding back and had Lokix launch a barrage of attacks to both damage and weaken Rika's Pokémon before succumbing to its status ailment. Despite this, Rika's {{p|Clodsire}} eventually defeated Floragato, winning the battle. Afterward, Katy consoled an emotional Liko, who began crying from the frustration of losing despite giving it her all in battle.

In ''[[HZ067|Shine on, Terastallization! Liko vs. Roy!]]'', Katy met up with Liko along with Ann to encourage Liko before her battle against Roy, Katy then watched the match unfold. After the battle, Katy and Grusha met up with Liko to encourage her on her progress as a Trainer.

In ''[[HZ096|Crash! Team Dragon Rampage!]]'', Dot revealed that after the [[Rising Volt Tacklers]] disbanded, Murdock went back to working for Katy at the Patisserie Soapberry.

In ''[[HZ098|Reunion in Cortondo]]'', Katy and Murdock met with Liko, Roy, Dot, and their new traveling companion, [[Ult]]. Upon learning the children reformed the Rising Volt Tacklers, Murdock grew concerned for their safety. Katy helped relieve Murdock's worries by having a rematch with Liko to show how much she had grown. She revealed her {{p|Teddiursa|Teddy}} had [[Evolution|Evolved]] into a {{p|Ursaring}} and used it to battle [[Pagogo]], which eventually ended in Liko's victory. Afterward, as she and Murdock saw the children off, Katy praised them for continuing to grow despite the hardships they faced. She then suggested that Murdock also had potential to grow, proposing that he rejoin Liko and the others when the time was right.

In ''[[HZ100|We Are the Rising Volt Tacklers!]]'', Katy was shown in a flashback, saying goodbye to Murdock as he left to rejoin the Rising Volt Tacklers.

====Character====
Katy has a kind and upbeat personality, being friendly to people she meets. However, when people are misbehaving or causing trouble in front of her like with Coral, she becomes more strict and fierce, not being afraid to tell people off. In battle Katy becomes more excited and ruthless, she loves going all out and does not like holding back against opponents, like with her battle against Rika.

|desc={{p|Ursaring|Teddy}} (Japanese: '''クマちゃん''' ''Kuma-chan'') is Katy's first known Pokémon and first appeared as a {{p|Teddiursa}}. It is capable of {{Tera}}stallizing into a {{t|Bug}} type. Katy used it in her battle against [[Liko]] and her {{TP|Liko|Floragato}}. Despite Liko Terastallizing her Floragato, Teddy was ultimately able to overwhelm and defeat her. It reappeared during a flashback in ''[[HZ063|Ice Battle! Cold-Eyed Grusha]]''.

In ''[[HZ098|Reunion in Cortondo]]'', it was shown to have evolved into an Ursaring. Katy used it in her [[rematch]] against Liko, where it battled [[Pagogo]], only to be defeated.

Teddy reappeared during a flashback in ''[[HZ100|We Are the Rising Volt Tacklers!]]'', when Murdock revealed he was leaving to rejoin the Rising Volt Tacklers.

Teddy's known moves are {{m|Charm}}, {{m|Slash}}, {{m|Sweet Scent}}, {{m|Fury Cutter}}, {{m|High Horsepower}}, and {{m|Hammer Arm}}.}}

|desc={{p|Lokix}} is Katy's second known Pokémon. In ''[[HZ056|Liko vs. Rika! Towards the Battle's End]]'', it participated in a [[Multi Battle|Tag Battle]] with Liko's Floragato against Rika's {{p|Dugtrio}} and {{p|Clodsire}}. After being {{status|poison}}ed, Lokix activated its Ability and managed to deal major damage to both opponents, paralyzing Dugtrio in the process, before finally succumbing to the poison.

Lokix's known moves are {{m|Throat Chop}}, {{m|Lunge}}, {{m|Struggle Bug}}, and {{m|Bounce}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Swarm}}.}}
